title: World Cup Supporter Match Day Photo Collage AI
sourceTitle: World Cup Supporter Match Day Photo Collage AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic lifestyle sports fan photo collage for Argentina, following same adult Argentinian football supporter with fair skin, expressive green eyes, shoulder-length wavy light-brown hair, and effortless South American beauty across six candid match-day photographs. Subject: six candid photos: stadium seats before kickoff, stadium entrance walk, smiling with a friend in the stands, cheering during the match, scarf-raised celebration, and supplies the swappable match day sequence detail for this template. same adult Argentinian football supporter with fair skin, expressive green eyes, shoulder-length wavy light-brown hair, and effortless South American beauty appears consistently in every frame wearing official Argentina national team jersey in sky blue and white stripes, dark denim mini skirt, white socks, black shoes, and Argentina supporter scarf, with the same face, hair, body proportions, and candid supporter energy. Scene: authentic World Cup stadium match-day atmosphere with massive blurred crowds surrounds the six-photo sequence with crowds, stadium entrances, stands, street-style approach shots, cheering moments, and authentic football match-day atmosphere. Composition: Fixed six-photo lifestyle collage: one larger main stadium-seat image plus five smaller candid documentary frames, each with natural perspective, varied match-day moments, and consistent subject identity. Signature Elements: Six candid photos, consistent supporter identity, national jersey, scarf, stadium seats, entrance walk, friend moment, cheering sequence, crowd blur, and real football match-day narrative. Style: Ultra-realistic sports fan lifestyle photography, World Cup stadium documentary style, candid social-photo collage, natural beauty, real crowd atmosphere, and polished editorial supporter story. Color Palette: Fixed team-color emphasis from Argentina supporter kit, natural stadium neutrals, crowd blur, daylight/crowd lighting, and realistic skin tones. Lighting: Authentic stadium and outdoor match-day light with natural face detail, soft crowd bokeh, realistic shadows, and clean documentary exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: World Cup Supporter Match Day Photo Collage Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic lifestyle sports fan photo collage for Brazil, following same adult Brazilian football supporter with warm tan skin, expressive brown eyes, shoulder-length dark curls, and relaxed match-day confidence across six candid match-day photographs. Subject: six candid photos: pre-match stadium seat portrait, entrance walk with shoulder bag, laughing with a friend, focused match reaction, flag-raised celebration, and quiet supplies the swappable match day sequence detail for this template. same adult Brazilian football supporter with warm tan skin, expressive brown eyes, shoulder-length dark curls, and relaxed match-day confidence appears consistently in every frame wearing Brazil national team jersey in yellow and green, dark denim skirt, white socks, black shoes, and green-yellow supporter scarf, with the same face, hair, body proportions, and candid supporter energy. Scene: authentic World Cup stadium match-day atmosphere with huge colorful crowds surrounds the six-photo sequence with crowds, stadium entrances, stands, street-style approach shots, cheering moments, and authentic football match-day atmosphere. Composition: Fixed six-photo lifestyle collage: one larger main stadium-seat image plus five smaller candid documentary frames, each with natural perspective, varied match-day moments, and consistent subject identity. Signature Elements: Six candid photos, consistent supporter identity, national jersey, scarf, stadium seats, entrance walk, friend moment, cheering sequence, crowd blur, and real football match-day narrative. Style: Ultra-realistic sports fan lifestyle photography, World Cup stadium documentary style, candid social-photo collage, natural beauty, real crowd atmosphere, and polished editorial supporter story. Color Palette: Fixed team-color emphasis from Brazil supporter kit, natural stadium neutrals, crowd blur, daylight/crowd lighting, and realistic skin tones. Lighting: Authentic stadium and outdoor match-day light with natural face detail, soft crowd bokeh, realistic shadows, and clean documentary exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
